mapper.select: select * from banner where is_visible = 1 order by sort_order asc

SELECT MAX(CASE WHEN config_key = 'years' THEN CAST(config_value AS SIGNED) END) AS years, MAX(CASE WHEN config_key = 'clients' THEN CAST(config_value AS SIGNED) END) AS clients, MAX(CASE WHEN config_key = 'daily_capacity' THEN CAST(config_value AS SIGNED) END) AS dailyCapacity, MAX(CASE WHEN config_key = 'reorder_rate' THEN CAST(config_value AS SIGNED) END) AS reorderRate FROM system_config WHERE config_key IN ('years', 'clients', 'daily_capacity', 'reorder_rate')

SELECT c.id, c.name, c.icon, COUNT(p.id) AS product_count FROM category c LEFT JOIN product p ON c.id = p.category_id WHERE c.is_visible = 1 GROUP BY c.id, c.name, c.icon, c.sort_order ORDER BY c.sort_order ASC

SELECT (SELECT config_value FROM system_config WHERE config_key = CONCAT('hero_title_', n)) AS title, (SELECT config_value FROM system_config WHERE config_key = CONCAT('hero_subtitle_', n)) AS subtitle FROM (SELECT 1 AS n UNION ALL SELECT 2 UNION ALL SELECT 3 UNION ALL SELECT 4) nums

SELECT p.id, p.category_id, p.name, p.cover_image AS image, p.material, p.moq, p.price_hint, c.name AS category_name FROM product p LEFT JOIN category c ON p.category_id = c.id WHERE p.is_visible = 1 ORDER BY p.sort_order ASC, p.view_count DESC LIMIT #{limit}
